answers.answer: D) Pre-aggregate to a user_daily table (user_id, date) with unique index, then use LAG/window on aggregated table (~50M rows). Pre-aggregation reduces 500M to ~50M user-days (10x reduction), then window function runs on manageable dataset. Option A materializes 90*N_users rows - explodes. Option B sorts 500M rows - too slow. Option C pulls all into memory - OOM.
